mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expense FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(record_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 1 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expense FROM record WHERE user_id = #{userId}
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(record_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month ASC
